task_completion.description: Open the pom.xml file for the DoseCalcService project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or IDE (such as VS Code, Eclipse, Vim, or Nano) is open, displaying the contents of the pom.xml file.

task_completion.description: Locate the org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient dependency in the pom.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The <dependency> block containing <groupId>org.apache.httpcomponents</groupId> and <artifactId>httpclient</artifactId> is visible in the editor.

task_completion.description: Add an <exclusions> block inside the httpclient dependency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An <exclusions> tag is added within the <dependency> block for httpclient, before the closing </dependency> tag.

task_completion.description: Add an exclusion specifically for commons-logging.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the <exclusions> block, there is an <exclusion> tag containing <groupId>commons-logging</groupId> and <artifactId>commons-logging</artifactId>.

task_completion.description: Ensure the httpclient dependency itself is not removed or commented out.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The httpclient <dependency> block remains intact and valid in the pom.xml file, and is not deleted or enclosed in XML comments (<!-- -->).

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor or IDE to modify the file rather than blindly echoing text via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an interactive editor interface (GUI or terminal-based like nano/vim) with the file open, rather than just shell commands like 'sed' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct pom.xml file in the DoseCalcService project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The editor's title bar, file explorer, or terminal path indicates the file being edited is /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/DoseCalcService/pom.xml.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete or corrupt other required dependencies.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other dependencies visible in the pom.xml (such as jcl-over-slf4j, slf4j-api, or junit) remain intact and unmodified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is exactly /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/DoseCalcService/pom.xml. The parent dependency is org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient (version 4.5.13). The artifact to be excluded is commons-logging:commons-logging. The <exclusion> must be placed inside an <exclusions> block within the httpclient <dependency> block. Other dependencies like jcl-over-slf4j and slf4j-api must remain intact.
